user_query: I'm planning a family vacation to Hawaii and I want to check the loading speed of our hotel's website. Fetch the loading speed data for the website and provide me with a random verse from the NIV Bible for daily inspiration during our trip.

TaskList.description: Identify the hotel's website URL for loading speed analysis.
Measure the loading speed of the identified hotel's website.
Fetch a random verse from the NIV Bible for daily inspiration.
